rxn_class_summary: Electrochemical [3+2] cycloaddition of nitromethane-derived dipoles with olefins to construct isoxazoline aldoximes
electrochemical_role: Anodic oxidation of I- (from n-Bu4NI) to I•/I2 and of CF3CO2- to •CF3 + CO2; these radicals abstract H from a cathodically reduced nitromethane-derived intermediate (II). Cathode reduces deprotonated nitromethane (aci-form) cleaving N-O bond.

key_intermediates.name: intermediate II (formaldehyde oxime anion / CH2=N-O-) after N-O cleavage and reduction
intermediate III: HC=N+(O-)(O-) type nitrile oxide/nitronate radical after HAT
[3+2] cycloadduct V between IV and styrene
intermediate VI after N-O cleavage/PT en route to product

electron_flow: At the anode, I- is oxidized to I•/I2 and CF3CO2- to •CF3 + CO2; at the cathode, the t-BuOK-generated aci-nitromethane (I) is reduced with N-O bond cleavage to give II. Anodic radicals then perform HAT on II to give dipole III, which self-[3+2] dimerizes to 1,2,5-oxadiazole 2-oxide IV; IV undergoes [3+2] with styrene and PT to deliver the isoxazoline aldoxime.
rate_determining_step: Self-[3+2] cycloaddition of III to form IV (DFT activation barrier ~112 kJ/mol), consistent with the 60 °C requirement; the C(sp3)-H cleavage of nitromethane is NOT rate-determining (secondary KIE 0.74).

probe_reagents.name: d8-styrene (1a-d8)
probe_reagents.observation: Gave 2a-d8 in 87% yield, confirming styrene H/D incorporation into product

probe_reagents.name: CD3NO2 vs CH3NO2 (intermolecular competition)
probe_reagents.observation: kH/kD = 0.74 (avg of four runs); inverse secondary KIE indicates C(sp3)-H cleavage of MeNO2 is not in the RDS and rehybridization occurs

probe_reagents.name: current on/off control
probe_reagents.observation: No reaction without current; electrical input crucial

probe_reagents.name: Cyclic voltammetry of components
probe_reagents.observation: n-Bu4NI Ep_ox = 0.85 V, CF3CO2Na = 1.12 V, 1,4-dioxane = 2.50 V vs Ag/AgCl; styrene (2.53 V) and 2a (2.60 V) are not directly oxidized

probe_reagents.name: CO2 detection experiment
probe_reagents.observation: CO2 evolution confirms anodic decarboxylation of CF3CO2-

probe_reagents.name: Control omission of CF3CO2Na, t-BuOK, n-Bu4NI, dioxane
probe_reagents.observation: Each component necessary; no product without n-Bu4NI (no current) or without both CF3CO2Na and t-BuOK

notes: DFT (M06-2X/6-31+G(d,p), LanL2DZ for I, SMD MeNO2) supports HAT from II being easier with I• and •CF3 than with I2, and characterizes the two [3+2] cycloadditions (self-dimerization of III to IV, then with styrene) as concerted but asynchronous. Inverse secondary KIE (0.74) reflects sp3→sp2 rehybridization at the MeNO2 carbon rather than C-H cleavage in RDS.
